task: Eric warned Nathan about the slippery road. He had nearly slipped earlier that morning.
The river carved the canyon over millions of years. It became a popular destination for hikers eventually.
Charlotte gifted Beatrix a necklace. She had picked it out at a small artisan market.
The sculptor carved the statue from marble. It now stands in the central plaza permanently.
Ronald greeted Vincent at the airport. He had just returned from a long international trip.
The cake collapsed in the oven during baking. It had not risen evenly because of cool butter.
Phoebe encouraged Lillian to apply. She had been hesitating about the position for weeks.
The mountain dominated the valley below. It cast long shadows across the entire landscape every afternoon.
Adam supported Elliot through the recovery. He visited the hospital almost daily for two months.
